title: ASR Outdoor Black Stretch Shock Cord Plastic Ball Utility Cord (Pack Sizes)
description:
Have you ever had a hard time tying an awning or canopy while camping or traveling? Look no further with the ASR Outdoor elastic shock cord with a plastic ball! These stretch cord tools are ideal for tying down tarps over virtually anything, especially if you’re hauling a trailer! Each 6” stretch cord is made of high-quality durable rubber and nylon with a plastic ball so you can count on them rain or shine. The cord is 4mm thick and the ball has a diameter of 1”. These stretch cords can be easily attached, fastened or removed from tarps or canopy, making these great tools to keep in your car, truck, boat or RV

ASR Outdoor Black Stretch Shock Cord Plastic Ball Utility Cord (Pack Sizes)

Have you ever had a hard time tying an awning or canopy while camping or traveling? Look no further with the ASR Outdoor elastic shock cord with a plastic ball! These stretch cord tools are ideal for tying down tarps over virtually anything, especially if you’re hauling a trailer!

Key Features

  • BLACK ELASTIC SHOCK CORD – The ASR Outdoor stretch shock cord with black ball is a must-have camping accessory. They are ideal for tying down tarps over virtually anything, especially if you’re hauling a trailer!
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION – Each 6” stretch cord is made of high-quality durable rubber and nylon with a plastic ball so you can count on them rain or shine. The cord is 4mm thick and the ball has a diameter of 1”.
  • REUSABLE STRETCH CORD – These stretch cords can be easily attached, fastened or removed from tarps or canopy, making these great tools to keep in your car, truck, boat or RV.
  • VERSATILE TOOL – Elastic shock cord is ideal for outdoor survival and home improvement uses, but they are also great for fastening lights and decorations, smart tools and organizing messy wires and cables.
  • SPECIFICATIONS – Material: rubber, nylon, plastic; Color: black; Length: 6”; Ball diameter: 1”; Cord thickness: 4mm, weather-resistant

Product Specifications

  • Size: Multipack

Each 6” stretch cord is made of high-quality durable rubber and nylon with a plastic ball so you can count on them rain or shine. The cord is 4mm thick and the ball has a diameter of 1”. These stretch cords can be easily attached, fastened or removed from tarps or canopy, making these great tools to keep in your car, truck, boat or RV.

Elastic shock cord is ideal for outdoor survival and home improvement uses, but they are also great for fastening lights and decorations, smart tools and organizing messy wires and cables. Make sure to grab a few of these before your next camping or RV trip!
